div.p: Create a new cached bill or pick one from the left panel.

span.t-esc: currentBill.header.bill_customer_phone or currentBill.header.customer_phone or currentBill.header.customer_mobile or '-'
state.customerInsights and state.customerInsights.customer and state.customerInsights.customer.last_address or currentBill.header.bill_customer_address or currentBill.header.customer_address or '-'

label.class: form-label mb-0 d-flex align-items-center gap-2 ab_pos_product_search_label
label.title: Search

tr.td: Add products to start building the bill.
No items found in selected invoice.

div.class: alert alert-warning d-flex flex-column gap-1 mb-0
div.span: Generate a new token to submit this bill.

div.class: alert alert-danger d-flex flex-column gap-1 mb-0
div.span: Please correct the data and try again.

t.t-if: state.hasCustomer or (props.bill and props.bill.header and props.bill.header.customer_id)
